protocols.Paper_title: Integrating the affinity and anion-exchange purification of AAV8: how the selective enrichment of full capsids at the affinity capture step enhances the downstream processing of gene therapies
protocols.Evidence: cultures were exposed to detergents including Triton X100, sodium deoxycholate, Deviron C16/13S9, and CTAB; debris was removed by centrifugation

protocols.Paper_title: Integrating the affinity and anion-exchange purification of AAV8: how the selective enrichment of full capsids at the affinity capture step enhances the downstream processing of gene therapies
protocols.Evidence: cultures were exposed to AAV-MAX lysis buffer; later described as a Tween-based buffer with proprietary composition

protocols.Paper_title: Integrating the affinity and anion-exchange purification of AAV8: how the selective enrichment of full capsids at the affinity capture step enhances the downstream processing of gene therapies
protocols.Evidence: cultures were exposed to high-salt conditions, NaCl or KCl; debris was removed by centrifugation

protocols.Paper_title: Integrating the affinity and anion-exchange purification of AAV8: how the selective enrichment of full capsids at the affinity capture step enhances the downstream processing of gene therapies
protocols.Evidence: clarified and conditioned lysates were quantified by qPCR; samples were treated to inactivate DNase and analyzed by TaqMan qPCR

protocols.Paper_title: Integrating the affinity and anion-exchange purification of AAV8: how the selective enrichment of full capsids at the affinity capture step enhances the downstream processing of gene therapies
protocols.Evidence: Sodium deoxycholate is listed as a lysis condition; lysates were processed by TFF and advanced to affinity chromatography.

protocols.Paper_title: Integrating the affinity and anion-exchange purification of AAV8: how the selective enrichment of full capsids at the affinity capture step enhances the downstream processing of gene therapies
protocols.Evidence: CTAB is described as a cationic detergent used in lysates; CTAB lysates maintained flux during TFF.

protocols.Paper_title: Integrating the affinity and anion-exchange purification of AAV8: how the selective enrichment of full capsids at the affinity capture step enhances the downstream processing of gene therapies
protocols.Evidence: Deviron 13-S9 lysates were processed by TFF, with affinity eluates analyzed by AEX-HPLC/MALS and transduction assays.

protocols.Paper_title: Integrating the affinity and anion-exchange purification of AAV8: how the selective enrichment of full capsids at the affinity capture step enhances the downstream processing of gene therapies
protocols.Evidence: Triton X-100 is listed among lysis conditions; affinity eluates from HEK293 lysates were evaluated for enrichment and transduction.

protocols.Paper_title: Integrating the affinity and anion-exchange purification of AAV8: how the selective enrichment of full capsids at the affinity capture step enhances the downstream processing of gene therapies
protocols.Evidence: Sodium deoxycholate lysates supplemented with salt before diafiltration showed improved flux and AAV recovery.

protocols.Paper_title: Integrating the affinity and anion-exchange purification of AAV8: how the selective enrichment of full capsids at the affinity capture step enhances the downstream processing of gene therapies
protocols.Evidence: KCl is listed as a salt-only lysis condition; KCl-derived lysates were processed through TFF and AvXcel analysis.

protocols.Paper_title: Integrating the affinity and anion-exchange purification of AAV8: how the selective enrichment of full capsids at the affinity capture step enhances the downstream processing of gene therapies
protocols.Evidence: NaCl is listed as a salt-only lysis condition; NaCl-derived feeds were used for affinity and AEX polishing workflows.

protocols.Paper_title: Integrating the affinity and anion-exchange purification of AAV8: how the selective enrichment of full capsids at the affinity capture step enhances the downstream processing of gene therapies
